name: clean shoulder MRI — left shoulder, intact rotator cuff

report.indication: Left shoulder pain after overhead activity.
report.technique: Left shoulder MRI without contrast at 3T.
report.findings: Rotator cuff: intact supraspinatus, infraspinatus, subscapularis, and teres minor tendons. No tear. Labrum: intact glenoid labrum. AC joint: mild degenerative change. Bones: no marrow oedema. Soft tissues: small subdeltoid bursal fluid.
report.impression:
1. Intact left rotator cuff.
2. Mild left AC joint osteoarthritis.
